---
title: "Diagnostics and Output"
description: "Plan diagnostics, field dumps, statistics, and reproducible run artifacts."
audience: user
status: planned
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

The current executable registers monitor and probe elements plus the
`DUMPEMFIELDS` action. Statistics, particle dumps, loss data, and element
diagnostics are controlled by the input model and build configuration.

The output-format reference is being rebuilt directly from the OPALX writers.
For production work, store the following together:

- Input file and small supporting text files.
- OPALX revision and build options.
- MPI rank count and execution backend.
- Random seeds and macro-particle counts.
- Logs, statistics, and checksums for large external datasets.

Large outputs are simulation data and do not belong in either documentation
repository.
